title: danthonia provincialis var. alpina
intro: Danthonia provincialis var. alpina, also known as Alpine Danthonia, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Alpine Danthonia lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and its antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using Alpine Danthonia include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Alpine Danthonia can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
